title: Brutalist E-commerce Page
description: A brutalist editorial e-commerce style guide inspired by poster-campaign aesthetics. Characterized by massive grotesque typography (Clash Display), soft-blurred gradient forms in red-orange tones (#DB4A2B, #F8A348), and a warm cream background (#E4E2DD). This aesthetic is optimized for high-end fashion, architecture, or lifestyle brands that want a 'poster-first' digital presence. Features include scroll-triggered entrance animations, mix-blend-mode interactions, and a clean, borderless grid structure.
